articles.title: Taylor Swift’s MSG Wedding: A $20Million Trojan Horse - Forbes
articles.description: Taylor Swift's MSG wedding signals a change in how money, independence, and shifting expectations are reshaping marriage for a generation of women.

articles.title: 'Minions & Monsters' knocks out 'Toy Story 5' out in animated brawl at Fourth of July box office - Entertainment Weekly
articles.description: It was an animated blood bath at the box office this weekend, and though 'Minions & Monsters' bested 'Toy Story 5,' its $36.4 million premiere marks a franchise low by a wide margin.

articles.description: Taylor Swift's bouquet toss has a winner ... and it stayed in the Chiefs family.

articles.description: Bruce Springsteen says he's a 'patriot' for standing up to Trump and encouraging Americans to do better.

articles.title: Rob Reiner skewers Trump with Jimmy Kimmel in surprise posthumous role - USA Today
articles.description: Rob Reiner has made a surprise posthumous appearance in Larry David's new HBO show for a sketch skewering President Donald Trump.
